hotels.name: B&B De Amsterdamse Poort
hotels.description_fr:

Il comprend la climatisation, un patio et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Occupant un bГғВўtiment datant de 1910, cette chambre d'hГғВҙtes est ГғВ  respectivement 23 km et 23 km de : MusГғВ©e Van Gogh et MusГғВ©e Moco.

Cette chambre d'hГғВҙtes comprend une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont ГғВ  votre disposition.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 23 km et 24 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘtГӮВ : Rijksmuseum et Heineken Experience. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport d'Amsterdam-Schiphol) est ГғВ  6 km.

hotels.description_en:
Spacious and Modern: B&B De Amsterdamse Poort in Haarlem offers a recently renovated, spacious environment with free WiFi. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, streaming services, and a private bathroom with a walk-in shower.
Comfortable Amenities: The property features a patio, work desk, and seating area. Additional amenities include a minibar, TV, and soundproofing. Free toiletries, a tea and coffee maker, and a hairdryer ensure a comfortable stay.
Prime Location: Located 6 km from Schiphol Airport, the bed and breakfast is near attractions such as the Anne Frank House (19 km), Vondelpark (22 km), and the Van Gogh Museum (23 km). Boating, kayaking, and canoeing are available in the surrounding area.
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 9.
hotels.description_es:
B&B De Amsterdamse Poort estГғВЎ en Haarlem, a 19 km de Casa de Ana Frank y a 22 km de Vondelpark, y ofrece alojamiento con aire acondicionado, patio y wifi gratis. Este bed and breakfast se encuentra en un edificio de 1910 y estГғВЎ a 23 km de Museo Van Gogh y a 23 km de Museo Moco.

El bed and breakfast dispone de TV de pantalla plana. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el bed and breakfast.

Rijksmuseum estГғВЎ a 23 km del alojamiento, y Heineken Experience estГғВЎ a 24 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Schiphol) estГғВЎ a 6 km.

A las parejas les encanta la ubicaciГғВіn ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Le han puesto un 9,5 para viajes de dos personas.

Este bed and breakfast tem uma televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano. Toalhas e roupa de cama sГғВЈo providenciadas neste bed and breakfast.

Rijksmuseum (museu) fica a 23 km de B&B De Amsterdamse Poort, enquanto Heineken Experience estГғВЎ a 24 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Schiphol fica a 6 km de distГғВўncia.

hotels.name: Park 43
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Park 43 se trouve ГғВ  Haarlem, ГғВ  respectivement 19 km et 23 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Maison Anne Frank et Vondelpark. Il possГғВЁde des hГғВ©bergements dotГғВ©s dГўвӮ¬в„ўune connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans l'ensemble des locaux. Il est installГғВ© ГғВ  respectivement 24 km, 24 km et 24 km de : MusГғВ©e Van Gogh, MusГғВ©e Moco et Rijksmuseum. Cet ГғВ©tablissement pour les personnes souffrant d'allergies se situe ГғВ  17 km de : Keukenhof.

Vous bГғВ©nГғВ©ficierez d'une salle de bains privative. Certains hГғВ©bergements comprennent ГғВ©galement une kitchenette ГғВ©quipГғВ©e dГўвӮ¬в„ўun rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur.

La rГғВ©gion est prisГғВ©e des amateurs de vГғВ©lo et lГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Park 43 assure un service de location de vГғВ©los.
hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: Park 43 in Haarlem offers a unique stay within a historic building. The guest house features parquet floors and a private entrance, providing a charming atmosphere.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a kitchenette. Additional facilities include a washing machine, work desk, and soundproofing, ensuring comfort and convenience.
Convenient Location: Located 13 km from Schiphol Airport, Park 43 is near attractions such as Keukenhof (17 km) and the Anne Frank House (19 km). Public transport options are highly rated by guests.
Activities and Surroundings: The property offers cycling, boating, and bicycle parking. Guests can also hire bikes and enjoy streaming services for entertainment.
hotels.description_es:
Park 43 se encuentra en Haarlem, a 17 km de Keukenhof y a 19 km de Casa de Ana Frank. El alojamiento estГғВЎ a unos 23 km de Vondelpark, a 24 km de Museo Van Gogh y a 24 km de Museo Moco. El hostal o pensiГғВіn hipoalergГғВ©nico ofrece wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento.

Todas las habitaciones incluyen baГғВұo privado, y algunas tambiГғВ©n ofrecen zona de cocina con nevera.

La zona es ideal para practicar ciclismo, y en el hostal o pensiГғВіn hay alquiler de bicicletas.

El personal de la recepciГғВіn 24 horas habla alemГғВЎn, inglГғВ©s, francГғВ©s y holandГғВ©s, y puede ayudar a la clientela a planificar su estancia.

Rijksmuseum estГғВЎ a 24 km del alojamiento, y Heineken Experience estГғВЎ a 24 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Schiphol) estГғВЎ a 13 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Park 43 localiza-se em Haarlem, a 19 km de Casa de Anne Frank e a 23 km de Vondelpark, e dispГғВөe de acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade. O alojamento estГғВЎ a cerca de 24 km de Museu Van Gogh, a 24 km de Museu Moco e a 24 km de Rijksmuseum (museu). Este alojamento antialГғВ©rgico situa-se a 17 km de Keukenhof.

Os quartos estГғВЈo equipados com uma casa de banho privativa, enquanto alguns quartos disponibilizam uma kitchenette com um frigorГғВӯfico.

A ГғВЎrea ГғВ© popular para ciclismo, e hГғВЎ aluguer de bicicletas disponГғВӯvel em Park 43.

Os funcionГғВЎrios da receГғВ§ГғВЈo aberta 24 horas falam alemГғВЈo, inglГғВӘs, francГғВӘs e neerlandГғВӘs, e podem ajudar no planeamento da sua estadia.

Heineken Experience fica a 24 km de Park 43, enquanto Leidseplein estГғВЎ a 25 km de distГғВўncia.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Haarlem, a 19 km da Casa di Anna Frank e 23 km da Vondelpark, Park 43 mette a disposizione il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. La struttura si trova a circa 24 km da Museo Van Gogh, 24 km da Museo Moco e 24 km da Rijksmuseum. L'alloggio ГғВЁ interamente senza allergeni ed ГғВЁ posizionato a 17 km da Parco Keukenhof.

Le camere sono dotate di un bagno privato, mentre alcune camere dispongono di un angolo cottura con un frigorifero.

La zona ГғВЁ famosa per il ciclismo, mentre presso questo affittacamere ГғВЁ disponibile un servizio di noleggio biciclette.

Lo staff della reception 24 ore su 24 parla tedesco, inglese, francese e olandese, e puГғВІ aiutarvi a pianificare il soggiorno.

Birrificio Heineken Experience ГғВЁ a 24 km da Park 43, mentre Leidseplein si trova a 25 km di distanza.

hotels.name: Paradijs Eiland
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВ©bergement Paradijs Eiland vous accueille ГғВ  Hillegom, ГғВ  8,1 km de ce lieu dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Keukenhof. Il comprend un patio, un jardin et une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite. Cette chambre d'hГғВҙtes possГғВЁde un parking privГғВ© gratuit et se trouve dans une rГғВ©gion oГғВ№ vous pourrez pratiquer des activitГғВ©s telles que la pГғВӘche et le vГғВ©lo.
BГғВ©nГғВ©ficiant dГўвӮ¬в„ўune terrasse et offrant une vue sur le lac, cette chambre d'hГғВҙtes comprend 1 chambre, un salon, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat par satellite, une cuisine ГғВ©quipГғВ©e, ainsi que 1 salle de bains avec une douche et un bain ГғВ  remous. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont mis ГғВ  votre disposition.
Un petit-dГғВ©jeuner continental est servi sur place.
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Paradijs Eiland dispose dГўвӮ¬в„ўun bain ГғВ  remous. Un service de location de vГғВ©los est assurГғВ© sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: Paradijs Eiland in Hillegom offers a serene garden and terrace with free WiFi. Guests enjoy a comfortable living room, private entrance, and modern amenities.
Relaxing Facilities: The property features a hot tub, outdoor seating area, and picnic spots. Additional services include a paid airport shuttle, bike hire, and free on-site private parking.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental breakfast is served with juice, fresh pastries, pancakes, cheese, and fruits. Express check-in and check-out services ensure a smooth arrival and departure.
Prime Location: Located 13 km from Schiphol Airport, Paradijs Eiland is near attractions such as Keukenhof (8 km) and Vondelpark (28 km). Guests appreciate the convenient location and comfortable accommodations.
hotels.description_es:
Paradijs Eiland estГғВЎ en Hillegom, a 8,1 km de Keukenhof, y dispone de patio, jardГғВӯn y wifi gratis. El bed and breakfast, que tiene parking privado gratis, estГғВЎ en una zona en la que se pueden practicar actividades como pesca y ciclismo.
El bed and breakfast dispone de una terraza y vistas al lago e incluye 1 dormitorio, sala de estar, TV de pantalla plana vГғВӯa satГғВ©lite, cocina equipada y 1 baГғВұo con ducha y baГғВұera de hidromasaje. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el bed and breakfast.
En el bed and breakfast se sirve un desayuno continental.
Paradijs Eiland ofrece baГғВұera de hidromasaje. El alojamiento ofrece servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.
Vondelpark estГғВЎ a 28 km del alojamiento, y Centro de Congresos RAI de ГғВҒmsterdam estГғВЎ a 29 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Paradijs Eiland encontra-se em Hillegom, a 8,1 km de Keukenhof, e apresenta pГғВЎtio, jardim e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito. Apresentando estacionamento privado gratuito, este bed and breakfast estГғВЎ numa ГғВЎrea onde os hГғВіspedes podem desfrutar de atividades como pesca e ciclismo.
Apresentando a um terraГғВ§o e vista do lago, este bed and breakfast inclui 1 quarto, uma sala de estar, televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano por satГғВ©lite, uma cozinha equipada e 1 casa de banho com chuveiro e banheira de hidromassagem. Toalhas e roupa de cama sГғВЈo providenciadas neste bed and breakfast.
Paradijs Eiland disponibiliza pequeno-almoГғВ§o continental.
Paradijs Eiland possui uma banheira de hidromassagem. Paradijs Eiland disponibiliza um serviГғВ§o de aluguer de bicicletas.
hotels.description_it:
Paradijs Eiland si trova a Hillegom, a 8,1 km da Parco Keukenhof, e propone un patio, un giardino e il WiFi gratuito. Il bed and breakfast dispone di parcheggio privato gratuito e si trova in una zona dove potrete praticare la pesca e il ciclismo.
Con terrazza e vista sul lago, questo bed and breakfast include 1 camera da letto, un soggiorno, una TV a schermo piatto con canali satellitari, una cucina con utensili e 1 bagno con doccia e vasca idromassaggio. Presso questo bed and breakfast troverete asciugamani e lenzuola tra i servizi disponibili.
Questo bed and breakfast offre una colazione continentale.
Paradijs Eiland offre una vasca idromassaggio. Un servizio di noleggio biciclette ГғВЁ disponibile presso questa struttura.

Comfortable Accommodations: Each room features a private bathroom, tea and coffee maker, and a dining area. Additional amenities include a minibar, TV, and free toiletries, ensuring a comfortable stay.

El bed and breakfast cuenta con TV de pantalla plana por cable. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el bed and breakfast.

B&B de Trochset ofrece servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.

Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy a sun terrace, garden, and outdoor dining area. Free bicycles are available for exploring the surroundings. The property features a lounge, games room, and indoor play area.
Delicious Breakfast: A variety of breakfast options are served, including continental, American, Italian, full English/Irish, and vegetarian. Special diet menus are available.
Local Attractions: Located 8 km from Stavoren Station and 104 km from Groningen Eelde Airport, the bed and breakfast is near Posthuis Theater (46 km) and Gaasterland Golfclub (10 km).

A las parejas les encanta la ubicaciГғВіn ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Le han puesto un 9,1 para viajes de dos personas.

hotels.name: Houseboat 'Boat Boutique'
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВ©bergement Houseboat 'Boat Boutique' se trouve ГғВ  Zwolle, ГғВ  respectivement 400 mГғВЁtres et 500 mГғВЁtres de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Poppodium Hedon et Theater De Spiegel. Vous pourrez pratiquer la pГғВӘche dans les environs. Cet hГғВ©bergement offre une vue sur la ville et comprend une terrasse ainsi quГўвӮ¬в„ўune connexion Wi-Fi gratuite dans lГўвӮ¬в„ўensemble de ses locaux.
Ce bateau-hГғВҙtel avec climatisation se compose de 1 chambre, d'un salon, d'une cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e avec un rГғВ©frigГғВ©rateur et une machine ГғВ  cafГғВ©, ainsi que de 1 salle de bains avec une douche et un sГғВЁche-cheveux. Cet hГғВ©bergement met ГғВ  votre disposition des serviettes et du linge de lit.
Un service de location de vГғВ©los est disponible sur place.
hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: Houseboat 'Boat Boutique' in Zwolle offers a spacious layout with one bedroom and a living room. The ground-floor unit features a private entrance and a terrace with city views.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a fully equipped kitchen. Additional facilities include a minimarket, coffee shop, outdoor seating area, and picnic area.
Convenient Location: Located 94 km from Groningen Eelde Airport, the boat is a short walk from Poppodium Hedon and Theatre De Spiegel. Nearby attractions include Museum de Fundatie and Dinoland Zwolle.
Activities and Surroundings: The property provides fishing opportunities and access to an ice-skating rink and boating. Guests can also enjoy activities such as bike hire and visit nearby parks.
hotels.description_es:
Houseboat 'Boat Boutique' se encuentra en Zwolle, a 4 min a pie de Poppodium Hedon y a 500 metros de Theater De Spiegel, en una zona donde se puede practicar pesca. Dispone de terraza, vistas a la ciudad y wifi gratis en todo el alojamiento.
Este barco con aire acondicionado consta de 1 dormitorio, una sala de estar, una cocina totalmente equipada con nevera y cafetera, y 1 baГғВұo con ducha y secador de pelo. Hay toallas y ropa de cama en el barco.
El barco ofrece servicio de alquiler de bicicletas.
Cerca del alojamiento hay puntos de interГғВ©s como Museum de Fundatie, Academiehuis Grote Kerk Zwolle y Sassenpoort. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Groningen-Eelde) estГғВЎ a 94 km.
A las parejas les encanta la ubicaciГғВіn ГўвӮ¬вҖқ Le han puesto un 10 para viajes de dos personas.
hotels.description_pt:
Houseboat 'Boat Boutique' fornece acomodaГғВ§ГғВөes em Zwolle, a 4 minutos a pГғВ© de Poppodium Hedon, 500 m de Theater De Spiegel e 6 minutos a pГғВ© de Museum de Fundatie. O alojamento apresenta um terraГғВ§o, vistas da cidade e acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em toda a propriedade.
Este barco com ar condicionado tem 1 quarto, uma sala de estar, uma cozinha totalmente equipada com frigorГғВӯfico e mГғВЎquina de cafГғВ©, e 1 casa de banho com chuveiro e um secador de cabelo. Toalhas e roupa de cama sГғВЈo providenciadas neste barco.
Houseboat 'Boat Boutique' disponibiliza um serviГғВ§o de aluguer de bicicletas, alГғВ©m disso os hГғВіspedes podem usufruir de pesca nas proximidades.
hotels.description_it:

Questa imbarcazione con aria condizionata comprende 1 camera da letto, un soggiorno, una cucina con utensili, frigorifero e macchina da caffГғВЁ, e 1 bagno con doccia e asciugacapelli. Presso questa imbarcazione troverete asciugamani e lenzuola in dotazione.
Un servizio di noleggio biciclette ГғВЁ disponibile presso questa imbarcazione, mentre nei dintorni potrete praticare la pesca.

hotels.name: IJsselgoud
hotels.description_fr:
Proposant un jardin, lГўвӮ¬в„ўhГғВ©bergement IJsselgoud se situe ГғВ  Zwolle, ГғВ  respectivement 8 km, 8,7 km et 9,1 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Park de Wezenlanden, Foundation Dominicanenklooster Zwolle et Van Nahuys Fountain. Vous pourrez profiter dГўвӮ¬в„ўune connexion Wi-Fi gratuite et dГўвӮ¬в„ўun parking privГғВ© disponible sur place.

Cette maison de vacances comporte 2 chambres, 1 salle de bains, du linge de lit, des serviettes, une tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, une cuisine entiГғВЁrement ГғВ©quipГғВ©e et une terrasse offrant une vue sur le jardin.

Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 9,4 km et 10 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Museum de Fundatie et Dinoland Zwolle. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport de Groningue-Eelde) est ГғВ  101 km.

LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement dispose dГўвӮ¬в„ўune tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, ainsi que d'une salle de bains privative comprenant des articles de toilette gratuits, un sГғВЁche-cheveux et une douche. Convenient Location: Located 79 km from Groningen Eelde Airport, the property is near attractions such as Holland Casino Leeuwarden (26 km) and Fries Museum (28 km).

Pastorie Waaxens ofrece TV de pantalla plana y baГғВұo privado con artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos, secador de pelo y ducha. TambiГғВ©n hay nevera y tostadora, ademГғВЎs de cafetera y hervidor.

hotels.description_pt:
Pastorie Waaxens encontra-se a 27 km de Holland Casino Leeuwarden e apresenta acomodaГғВ§ГғВөes com um jardim, um terraГғВ§o e um serviГғВ§o de concierge, para sua conveniГғВӘncia. Pastorie Waaxens disponibiliza acesso Wi-Fi e estacionamento privado gratuitamente.

O alojamento possui uma televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano e uma casa de banho privativa com produtos de higiene pessoal gratuitos, um secador de cabelo e chuveiro. Um frigorГғВӯfico e torradeira tambГғВ©m estГғВЈo disponГғВӯveis, assim como uma mГғВЎquina de cafГғВ© e uma chaleira.

O alojamento disponibiliza opГғВ§ГғВөes de pequeno-almoГғВ§o continental, vegetariano ou sem glГғВәten.

Groene Ster Golfclub fica a 22 km de Pastorie Waaxens, enquanto WTC Expo Leeuwarden estГғВЎ a 26 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Groningen Eelde fica a 79 km de distГғВўncia.
hotels.description_it:
A 27 km da Holland Casino Leeuwarden, Pastorie Waaxens propone sistemazioni con un giardino, una terrazza e un servizio concierge, che fa sempre comodo. Il WiFi gratuito ГғВЁ tra i servizi disponibili in tutta la struttura e cГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВЁ un parcheggio privato disponibile sul posto.

Questo bed and breakfast offre una TV a schermo piatto e un bagno privato con set di cortesia, asciugacapelli e doccia. Tra i servizi offerti anche un frigorifero e un tostapane, oltre a una macchina da caffГғВЁ e un bollitore elettrico.

In struttura ГғВЁ disponibile una colazione continentale, vegetariana o senza glutine.

Groene Ster Golfclub ГғВЁ a 22 km da Pastorie Waaxens, mentre WTC Expo Leeuwarden si trova a 26 km dalla struttura. Aeroporto di Groninga-Eelde si trova a 79 km di distanza.

hotels.name: Noardlik B&B
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Noardlik B&B vous accueille ГғВ  Birdaard, ГғВ  respectivement 17 km et 47 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Holland Casino - Leeuwarden et Posthuis Theater. Il comprend une connexion Wi-Fi gratuite, la climatisation, un jardin et un bar.
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement dispose dГўвӮ¬в„ўune tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat, ainsi que d'une salle de bains privative comprenant des articles de toilette gratuits, un sГғВЁche-cheveux et une douche.
Un petit-dГғВ©jeuner buffet, ГғВ  la carte ou continental est servi sur place.
Vous sГғВ©journerez ГғВ  respectivement 13 km et 16 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘtГӮВ : Groene Ster Golfclub et Fries Museum. L'aГғВ©roport le plus proche (AГғВ©roport de Groningue-Eelde) est ГғВ  67 km.
Les distances indiquГғВ©es dans la description de l'ГғВ©tablissement sont calculГғВ©es avec ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap.
hotels.description_en:
Historic Setting: Noardlik B&B in Burdaard offers a recently renovated historic building with a beautiful garden and a cosy bar. Guests enjoy free WiFi throughout the property.
Comfortable Accommodations: Rooms feature air-conditioning, private bathrooms with walk-in showers, and garden or river views. Additional amenities include soundproofing, parquet floors, and wardrobes.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental buffet breakfast is served with local specialities, warm dishes, cheese, fruits, and juice. Private check-in and check-out services ensure a smooth arrival and departure.
Local Attractions: Nearby attractions include Groene Ster Golfclub (13 km), Fries Museum (16 km), and Holland Casino Leeuwarden (17 km). Groningen Eelde Airport is 67 km away.

El bed and breakfast ofrece TV de pantalla plana y baГғВұo privado con artГғВӯculos de aseo gratuitos, secador de pelo y ducha.
En el alojamiento se puede disfrutar de un desayuno buffet, a la carta o continental.
Groene Ster Golfclub estГғВЎ a 13 km del alojamiento, y Museo FrisГғВіn estГғВЎ a 16 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Groningen-Eelde) estГғВЎ a 67 km.

hotels.name: Abdij - Suites
hotels.description_fr:
LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement 4 ГғВ©toiles Abdij - Suites se situe ГғВ  Dokkum, ГғВ  respectivement 30 km et 46 km de ces lieux dГўвӮ¬в„ўintГғВ©rГғВӘt : Holland Casino - Leeuwarden et Martini Tower. Il est installГғВ© ГғВ  respectivement 22 km, 27 km et 27 km de : Groene Ster Golfclub, Gare de Grijpskerk et Gare de Leeuwarden Camminghaburen. Cet ГғВ©tablissement non-fumeurs vous accueille ГғВ  45 km de : Salle de concert Simplon Poppodium.

LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement propose des hГғВ©bergements dotГғВ©s de la climatisation, dГўвӮ¬в„ўun bureau, dГўвӮ¬в„ўune bouilloire, dГўвӮ¬в„ўun coffre-fort et dГўвӮ¬в„ўune tГғВ©lГғВ©vision ГғВ  ГғВ©cran plat. Ils comprennent ГғВ©galement une salle de bains privative pourvue dГўвӮ¬в„ўune douche. Des serviettes et du linge de lit sont fournis.

LГўвӮ¬в„ўГғВ©tablissement Abdij - Suites sert un petit-dГғВ©jeuner buffet ou ГғВ  la carte.
hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Abdij - Suites in Dokkum offers 4-star comfort with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and city views. Each room includes a work desk, free toiletries, and a TV.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy bathrobes, tea and coffee makers, hairdryers, and electric kettles. Additional features include a shower, slippers, and a wardrobe.
Dining Options: A buffet breakfast is available, alongside ГғВ  la carte selections.
Convenient Location: Located 73 km from Groningen Eelde Airport, the hotel is near attractions such as Groene Ster Golfclub (21 km) and Fries Museum (29 km).
Couples particularly like the location ГўвӮ¬вҖқ they rated it 10 for a two-person trip.
Distance in property description is calculated using ГӮВ© OpenStreetMap
hotels.description_es:
Abdij - Suites es un alojamiento de 4 estrellas situado en Dokkum, a 30 km de Holland Casino Leeuwarden y a 46 km de Torre Martini. El alojamiento estГғВЎ a unos 22 km de Groene Ster Golfclub, a 27 km de EstaciГғВіn Grijpskerk y a 27 km de EstaciГғВіn Leeuwarden Camminghaburen. Este alojamiento libre de humo estГғВЎ a 45 km de Sala de conciertos Simplon Poppodium.

El hotel ofrece habitaciones con aire acondicionado, escritorio, hervidor, caja fuerte, TV de pantalla plana y baГғВұo privado con ducha. En Abdij - Suites, las habitaciones disponen de ropa de cama y toallas.

El alojamiento ofrece desayuno buffet o a la carta.

Museo FrisГғВіn estГғВЎ a 29 km del alojamiento, y EstaciГғВіn de Leeuwarden estГғВЎ a 30 km. El aeropuerto (Aeropuerto de Groningen-Eelde) estГғВЎ a 73 km.
hotels.description_pt:
Abdij - Suites ГғВ© um alojamento de 4 estrelas situado em Dokkum, a 30 km de Holland Casino Leeuwarden e a 46 km de Martini Tower. O alojamento estГғВЎ a cerca de 22 km de Groene Ster Golfclub, a 27 km de Grijpskerk Station e a 27 km de Leeuwarden Camminghaburen Station. Este alojamento nГғВЈo fumador encontra-se a 45 km de Sala de Concertos Simplon Poppodium.

Este alojamento com ar condicionado providencia quartos com secretГғВЎria, chaleira, cofre, televisГғВЈo de ecrГғВЈ plano e uma casa de banho privativa com chuveiro. No alojamento, os quartos incluem roupa de cama e toalhas.

Abdij - Suites disponibiliza pequeno-almoГғВ§o buffet ou ГғВ  carta.

Fries Museum fica a 29 km de Abdij - Suites, enquanto EstaГғВ§ГғВЈo de Leeuwarden estГғВЎ a 30 km da propriedade. O Aeroporto de Groningen Eelde fica a 73 km de distГғВўncia.
hotels.description_it:
Con camere a 4 stelle, Abdij - Suites ГғВЁ un alloggio posizionato a Dokkum a 30 km da Holland Casino Leeuwarden e 46 km da Martini Tower. La struttura si trova a circa 22 km da Groene Ster Golfclub, 27 km da Grijpskerk Station e 27 km da Leeuwarden Camminghaburen Station. L'alloggio ГғВЁ interamente non fumatori ed ГғВЁ ubicato a 45 km da Simplon Poppodium.

Questo hotel offre agli ospiti camere climatizzate con una scrivania, un bollitore elettrico, una cassaforte, una TV a schermo piatto e un bagno privato con doccia. Presso Abdij - Suites, le camere includono lenzuola e asciugamani.

Questa struttura offre una colazione a buffet o ГғВ  la carte.

Fries Museum ГғВЁ a 29 km da Abdij - Suites, mentre Stazione di Leeuwarden si trova a 30 km dalla struttura.
